title: Lego Bricks
description: This mod adds lego bricks to the minecraft.
body:
![Banner](https://i.ibb.co/Wpc0FvP/logo2.png)

This mod will add Lego bricks to the game, which can be used as a decoration or as a building. The mod presents a wide range of Lego bricks inspired by various classic Minecraft colors.
<hr> <center>

![Modrinth](https://i.ibb.co/RDczLz6/1.png) ![Modrinth](https://i.ibb.co/YNtrXsy/image.png)
